decision.next_action: B2R-repeat: scoped Manipulation remains fail-closed; use a new source-owned exit dataset or stop treating direct-event overlay as a tradable branch until source/PnL changes.
decision.primary_blocker: no predeclared stratum/action passed both absolute after-cost and specificity gates
